paper_title: Genome-Wide Transcription and mRNA Half-Life Analysis

methods.description: This method involves processing and normalizing microarray data using the robust multiarray averaging method in R software with Bioconductor and the affy package. It is used to prepare the data for further analysis by ensuring consistency and accuracy.

steps.description: All microarray analyses were based on publicly available data sets.
steps.searchable_summary: fetch microarray data from public repositories

steps.description: The raw data were processed and normalized using the robust multiarray averaging method in R software using Bioconductor and the affy package.
steps.searchable_summary: process and normalize microarray data using R and Bioconductor

methods.description: This method retrieves normalized transcription values from specific GEO data sets for further analysis.

steps.description: The fie transcription values were retrieved from the GEO data set GSE19851 as the normalized transcription values.
steps.searchable_summary: retrieve normalized transcription values from GEO data set GSE19851

methods.description: This method prepares the data for genome-wide analysis by excluding certain probes and setting transcription borderlines.

steps.description: Retrogene and parent probes that corresponded to multiple gene models were excluded from genome-wide analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: exclude specific probes from genome-wide analysis

steps.description: The transcription borderline for transcribed genes (gcRMA $ 5) was based on the minimal density of genes between peaks indicating absent or background signals versus high transcription signals.
steps.searchable_summary: set transcription borderline for transcribed genes

methods.description: This method involves generating randomized sets of genes, plotting data, and performing statistical tests to analyze gene data.

steps.description: Randomized sets of genes or gene pairs were generated.
steps.searchable_summary: generate randomized sets of genes or gene pairs

steps.description: Plots drawn and statistical tests calculated in R.
steps.searchable_summary: draw plots and calculate statistical tests in R

steps.description: The significance of density distributions was tested using the MWW rank-sum test with correction and cotranscription correlation by the Pearson product-moment correlation coefficient (r).
steps.searchable_summary: test significance of density distributions using MWW rank-sum test and Pearson correlation
